GenAiFunction.description: Use this function to interact with Salesforce's public REST APIs under the context of the running user's permissions. This is ideal for executing SOQL queries and retrieving or modifying Salesforce data and metadata. - If you need the IDs of users, silently perform USER queries. - Always use the latest API version, which is currently 60.0. - Consider Tooling API when not querying org data. - When using SOQL queries as part of URL parameters, make sure to URL Encode special characters like "%" that must be encoded as "%25". Make sure to use subqueries if the speed of queries can be increased.
